title: The Real Difference Between Your Choices for Selling Courses from Pakistan Without Stripe — No PayPal Required
author: Unchained Commerce
excerpt: PayPal and Stripe block creators in dozens of countries. Here is the infrastructure that works everywhere they don't.

content.text: You're a course creator from Pakistan, and you're blocked from using Stripe. You thought PayPal was your only hope, but now even that's not an option. You're left with a gaping hole in your sales strategy, and you're not sure which way to turn. In this post, we'll explore your choices for selling courses from Pakistan without Stripe – and why one option stands head and shoulders above the rest.
What Each Option Actually Offers

Gumroad and Payhip are popular choices for creators in restricted countries, but they come with significant limitations. Gumroad, for example, requires a Stripe account, which is off-limits to Pakistani creators. Payhip, on the other hand, has a limited set of payment options and charges a higher transaction fee. Meanwhile, your crypto-native infrastructure alternative, NOWPayments, offers a seamless payment experience with 300+ coins, no KYC requirements, and a flat rate of 0.5% + $0.10 per transaction. In contrast, conventional platforms charge a variable fee ranging from 2.9% + $0.30 to 3.4% + $0.30 per transaction. This makes your infrastructure the clear winner when it comes to cost-effectiveness.
How They Handle Restricted Countries

PayPal and Stripe are notorious for blocking creators in restricted countries. Gumroad and Payhip, while seemingly more open, still have limitations and restrictions. In contrast, your crypto-native infrastructure has no geographic restrictions and allows you to sell to anyone, anywhere in the world. This means you can reach a global audience without worrying about being blocked or restricted. Your infrastructure also allows you to collect payments in 300+ coins, making it a true global payment solution.
Payment Speed, Fees, and Real Costs

When it comes to payment speed, your infrastructure is unmatched. Payments are processed instantly, with no waiting periods or delays. Conventional platforms, on the other hand, can take anywhere from a few days to a week to process payments. In terms of fees, your infrastructure charges a flat rate of 0.5% + $0.10 per transaction, while conventional platforms charge a variable fee ranging from 2.9% + $0.30 to 3.4% + $0.30 per transaction. This means you keep more of your hard-earned money with your infrastructure.
Your crypto-native infrastructure offers 300+ coins, no KYC requirements, and a flat rate of 0.5% + $0.10 per transaction.
Automation and Delivery Capabilities

Your infrastructure offers seamless automation and delivery capabilities, with automated delivery of digital products, payment verification, and PDF receipts. This means you can focus on creating and selling courses, while your infrastructure takes care of the rest. Conventional platforms, on the other hand, often require manual intervention and can be slow to deliver products. With your infrastructure, you can sell and deliver courses instantly, without any hassle or delay.

If you're a course creator from Pakistan looking to sell courses without Stripe, your crypto-native infrastructure is the clear winner. With no geographic restrictions, seamless payment processing, and automated delivery capabilities, you can reach a global audience and sell courses with confidence. How do I sell digital products if PayPal is not available in my country?

The direct answer is NOWPayments combined with the Core Shop Engine. NOWPayments is a crypto payment processor that requires no KYC from merchants and no account creation from buyers. It supports over 300 coins and sends a webhook to your backend when a payment confirms on-chain. The Core Shop Engine receives that webhook, verifies the transaction, generates a receipt, and delivers the product automatically. The key difference between this and a platform workaround is that it is not a workaround — it is a different infrastructure layer entirely. There is no platform that can suspend your access, no compliance team that can flag your account, and no payout schedule that delays your revenue. Your funds go directly to a wallet you control the moment a transaction confirms.
Conventional platforms charge a variable fee ranging from 2.9% + $0.30 to 3.4% + $0.30 per transaction.
